entries.reason: Resolver authority, producer adoption, projections, migration compatibility, and rollback form one atomic contract; splitting would create intermediate consumers without the authoritative resolver or fail-closed publication semantics.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.
